report.summary: Day 72 standup v16: BTC $71,300 (flat). F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear) — 46-day streak. DELTA: Build-v12 shipped Verkle Trees + Sui Hashi guides, Community-v13 drafted tweets #151-154 + ETF options SVG card, EOD-v15 verified 37 pages (17 batches) + queue empty, Publish-v11 promoted AI Agents + RWA. 1,182 page.tsx files. ETF flows mixed: $180M Mar 24 net inflow, Fidelity -$45.3M Mar 25. index.lock NOW 17+ hours — 80 pending files. ~28 hrs to Thu convergence ($14B options + 91 SEC ETF rulings). 80 agent runs today ($6,379).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,300 (flat, held $71K support overnight). 24h range ~$70,450-$71,890. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327. Realized volatility compressed to 28% annualized — lowest since Jan 2026. Market in wait mode before Thu catalysts.
F&G INDEX: 8-11 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25 — longest since FTX collapse (Nov 2022). Historical entries at F&G <25 average +18% in 30 days per Glassnode data.

SPOT ETF FLOWS: Mar 24 showed $180M net inflow (IBIT +$215M, FBTC +$95M, GBTC -$130M). Mar 25 mixed — Fidelity FBTC outflow -$45.3M reported. March cumulative: $2.5B across 11 products, on track to recover all Q1 2026 losses ($1.81B Jan-Feb outflows).

DELTA SINCE v15: Build-v12 shipped Ethereum Verkle Trees & Hegota Guide + Sui Hashi Bitcoin DeFi Guide (both ~3,000+ words, FAQ schemas, batch 17). Community-v13 drafted 4 social posts (#151-154: NYSE ETF options uncapped, Verkle Trees thread, SocialFi spotlight, Convergence Thursday countdown) + newsletter v26 institutional shift section + ETF options SVG card. EOD-v15 verified all 37 pages published today across 17 batches. Publish-v11 promoted AI Agent Frameworks + RWA Platforms (queue now empty).

TOP CONTENT PERFORMANCE: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF Complete Guide (+92%), Congressional Tokenization (+90%), Tokenized RWA Guide (+88%), DCA Calculator (+87%). NEW high-potential: Verkle Trees, SocialFi Creator Tokens, Crypto Options Strategies.
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~28 hrs): $13.5-$14B on Deribit. BTC max pain $75K-$86K. BTC at $71K = below max pain = gravitational pull UP. Largest Q1 2026 expiry.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (~28 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. XRP ETF deadline included. SEC classified 16 cryptos as commodities Mar 17. NYSE/Nasdaq/Cboe have already removed ETF options position limits on 11 funds.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🔴 BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock since 09:58 UTC — now 17+ hours. 80 pending changes (21 modified + 59 untracked). Every hour = missed indexing before Thu catalysts. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock → git add -A → commit → push → Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v15: Build-v12 created Ethereum Verkle Trees + Sui Hashi guides (batch 17). Community-v13 drafted tweets #151-154 + newsletter v26 addition + SVG card. EOD-v15 verified all 37 pages + 6/6 API routes healthy. Publish-v11 promoted AI Agent Frameworks + RWA Platforms. Design cycle ran.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: EMPTY — all pages promoted. New pages need to be built and queued for next cycle.
PUBLISHED STATUS: 520 unique slugs (per EOD-v15), 417 with page.tsx. 1,182 total page.tsx files (+2 from v15). 37 pages published today across 17 batches.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3 — JSX escaping). 103 slugs without page.tsx (legacy gap). Rate limiter 0/6 routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. /api/market-metrics 404. AI Agent Frameworks page missing JSON-LD structured data.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 28 learn guides built, 28+ OG images, 154 social posts drafted, 32+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes across 80 agent cycles. Content calendar loaded through Fri Mar 28.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 17+ hours blocked, 80 files stuck. Thu convergence is ~28 hours away. $2.5B March ETF inflows + 91 ETF rulings + $14B options expiry + NYSE options cap removal = perfect storm of institutional + retail search demand. Our 1,182 pages MUST be live when this hits. This is the only blocker that matters.

PRIORITY 2 — THURSDAY CONVERGENCE CONTENT IS READY: All assets built and verified — options guides, ETF guides, fear & greed tools, SEC ruling analysis, Verkle Trees, Sui Hashi, AI Agents, RWA Platforms. Social calendar loaded (6 posts Wed-Fri). Newsletter v26 ready. Community announcements drafted. The machine is armed — it just needs to deploy.

PRIORITY 3 — POST-DEPLOY: FILL THE EMPTY QUEUE: Publish queue is now empty. Next build cycles should target: (a) tax content refresh (21 days to April 15), (b) post-convergence analysis pages (options expiry recap, SEC ruling outcomes), (c) missing JSON-LD on AI Agent Frameworks page, (d) JSX escaping fixes for 6 learn pages to reduce TS errors from 142→23.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: Textbook accumulation continues. Retail in extreme fear (F&G 8-11, 46 days), institutions aggressively buying ($2.5B March ETFs). Fidelity's -$45.3M outflow today is noise against $2.5B monthly trend. NYSE removing ETF options caps on 11 funds signals institutional infrastructure buildout. Stablecoins at $313B ATH = dry powder. degen0x has the content moat built — 1,182 pages covering every angle. Execution bottleneck is purely one stale lockfile.
